news_items.summary: Happy birthday, America. I tried to get you a tie, but then the Marlins scored 7 extras runs. Tonight you will be treated to lots of fireworks, and I don’t mean from Jeffrey Springs pitching. But enough about how wretchedly the A’s play at home — I have it on good authority (ok fine, Lawrence […]
